widgets.title: Total Soluções
widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM learned_solutions WHERE is_deprecated = 0

widgets.title: Projetos Ativos
widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM factory_projects WHERE is_active = 1

widgets.title: Tokens Economizados
widgets.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tokens_saved), 0) as value FROM learned_solutions

widgets.title: Total Reusos
widgets.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(usage_count), 0) as value FROM learned_solutions

widgets.title: Custo Economizado (USD)
widgets.query: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(tokens_saved), 0) / 1000000.0 * 3.0, 2) as value FROM learned_solutions

widgets.title: Soluções por Domínio
widgets.query: SELECT domain as label, COUNT(*) as value FROM learned_solutions WHERE is_deprecated = 0 GROUP BY domain ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Soluções por Agente
widgets.query: SELECT source_agent as label, COUNT(*) as value FROM learned_solutions WHERE is_deprecated = 0 AND source_agent != '' GROUP BY source_agent ORDER BY value DESC

widgets.title: Distribuição de Qualidade
widgets.query: SELECT CAST(quality_score * 10 AS INTEGER) / 10.0 as bucket, COUNT(*) as count FROM learned_solutions WHERE is_deprecated = 0 GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

widgets.title: Capuras por Mês
widgets.query: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as captures, COALESCE(SUM(tokens_output), 0) as tokens FROM learned_solutions GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.title: Top 10 Soluções Mais Reutilizadas
widgets.query: SELECT domain, pattern, language, usage_count, quality_score, solution_summary FROM learned_solutions WHERE is_deprecated = 0 ORDER BY usage_count DESC, quality_score DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Últimas 10 Capturas
widgets.query: SELECT domain, pattern, source_agent, quality_score, created_at, solution_summary FROM learned_solutions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Projetos da Fábrica
widgets.query: SELECT name, language, framework, total_solutions_used, total_tokens_saved, last_active_at FROM factory_projects WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY last_active_at DESC

alerts.condition: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learned_solutions WHERE quality_score >= 0.8 AND usage_count = 0 AND created_at < datetime('now', '-30 days')
alerts.message: Existem {value} soluções de alta qualidade sem reuso. Considere promovê-las.

alerts.condition: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learned_solutions WHERE is_deprecated = 0 AND (last_used_at IS NULL OR last_used_at < datetime('now', '-180 days'))
alerts.message: Existem {value} soluções sem uso há 6+ meses. Considere cleanup.

alerts.condition: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens_used), 0) FROM learning_sessions WHERE started_at >= date('now', 'start of month')
alerts.message: Uso de tokens este mês: {value}. Aproximando do limite diário.
